MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS ROBERT HATHER and ALFRED GRIFFITH'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award -- Denied; insufficient service -- must be served by hand. See CCP Section 1290.4(b)(1). (KMM/301/JU) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
